data.title: Pangram 3.0 AI detector released, enhances transparency with detailed insight into text modified with AI.
data.description: Pangram 3.0 has recently been launched in New York. This latest version is designed to identify text that has been generated, modified, or reviewed using AI-driven applications.

data.title: Despite the Fed policy change, Bitcoin struggles to surpass $94,000 due to market sentiment.
data.description: The value of Bitcoin remains unable to surpass $94,000 in recent trading, despite optimism among traders regarding the long-term outlook for US monetary policy and the cryptocurrency market.

data.title: DNA&STONE Agency marks year with award-winning campaigns, Radical Empathy work, and leadership growth. Seattle, Dec. 11, 2025.
data.description: In December 11, 2025, based in Seattle, DNA&STONE, a full-service agency renowned for its award-winning campaigns and Radical Empathy-driven work, successfully wrapped up its first full year. The agency has solidified its position for the future with a strengthened leadership team. The team's efforts have garnered significant recognition in the industry, positioning DNA&STONE as a key player to watch.

data.title: Pathways LA's Winter Wonderland event attracted over 900 attendees, creating a festive atmosphere for LA families.
data.description: On December 6th, 2025, in Los Angeles, Pathways LA organized its yearly Winter Wonderland Toy & Book Celebration at the Westin Bonaventure. The event aimed to create a joyous atmosphere for families in the area, drawing a large crowd from the community.

data.title: Seekr attains SOC 2 Type II Compliance, proving enterprise-grade security. Boosts trust with data protection.
data.description: An external evaluation has confirmed the effectiveness of Seekr's security measures throughout their organization and offerings. This validation allows businesses and government entities to confidently implement their AI technology with assurance. Seekr, based in RESTON, Va., received this affirmation on Dec. 11, 2025, bolstering its reputation as a trusted provider of explainable and reliable artificial intelligence solutions for enterprises.

data.title: Deloitte to ignite innovation at CES 2026, using technology to secure competitive advantage for clients. #LasVegas #Dec112025.
data.description: In Las Vegas on December 11, 2025, Deloitte is hosting an event at CES® 2026 aimed at assisting organizations in defining their future and gaining a competitive advantage. Through the integration of extensive business expertise and cutting-edge technologies, Deloitte is aiding clients in achieving their goals.

data.title: Buffalo Biodiesel completes compliance milestones with approval of Secondary Containment Retrofit Plan and Overfill Prevention Work Plan in Buffalo, NY - Dec. 11, 2025.
data.description: Buffalo Biodiesel Inc., a prominent recycler and renewable-feedstock company based in Buffalo, New York, announced that their Secondary Containment Retrofit Plan and Overfill Prevention Work Plan have been accepted and approved on December 11, 2025. The company specializes in purchasing and collecting used cooking oil (UCO) as part of its vertically integrated business model. This approval marks a significant step for the company, showcasing its commitment to environmental safety and compliance.
